title: Inventory mismatches across rules, script, docs, and src
summary: Locate and document mismatches between .rules, zed-agentops-init.sh, README*, and current MCP server behavior to guide aligned updates.
acceptance_criteria: All relevant mismatches across .rules, zed-agentops-init.sh, README.md, README-jp.md, and src/ are enumerated.
Each mismatch includes a brief note on expected correction (update/remove/clarify).
Findings are sufficient to drive tickets p1-t2 through p2-t3.

steps.description: Review .rules and identify any instructions that diverge from actual MCP server behavior.
Review zed-agentops-init.sh and compare its behavior and comments with current runtime expectations.
Review README.md and README-jp.md for inaccuracies or missing guidance compared to src/ behavior.
Document mismatches with proposed fix type and file targets.

notes: Mismatch: `.rules` and README* list tools `journal_append`, `roll_forward_replay`, and `continue_state_rebuild`, but tool registry does not expose them. Fix: remove from docs or implement in src.
Mismatch: README* says `zed-agentops-init.sh` creates `.agent/journal.jsonl` and `--update` removes legacy files, but the script does neither. Fix: update script or docs.
Mismatch: README* describes `ops_handoff_export` taking an optional path, but the tool signature accepts no arguments. Fix: update docs or add parameter support.
Mismatch: README* claims all MCP tools accept `truncate_limit`, but tool schemas do not include it. Fix: update docs or extend tool registry.
Mismatch: README quick start uses `zed-agentops-init`, while repository only ships `zed-agentops-init.sh`. Fix: clarify installed command name or rename script.
Mismatch: README-jp includes `ops_start_task`/`ops_update_task`/`ops_end_task` tips, English README omits. Fix: align bilingual sections.
Mismatch: README* omits `.agent/observability_summary.json`, but src defines and writes it via `ops_observability_summary`. Fix: document it in “Where things live.”
Mismatch: `.rules` in repo differs from the template written by `zed-agentops-init.sh` (explicit handoff-derived-only line). Fix: align the two sources.
